cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Floryn is the best companion to have when you pick Leomord. 
This combination let's Leomord dive into enemies without fear and easily make it out alive, since Floryn's skills can reach a wide area.
Angela is also a good pick, her skills can easily help Leomord sustain the enemies hits with shield and heal she provides.

Rafaela is a nice pick as well, with the movement speed and heal she can give. Although her passive needs the hero to die in order to revive, it is very helpful in making sure Leomord can be back in the fight even after he dies.

counters.counter_desc: With Hilda's early game capabilities as a roam,  if you don't have teammates to help you farm, you wont be able to win against a good Hilda player, you'll deplete your health as you are taking you farm.
Gloo can easily offset your ultimate and you won't be able to unleash your full potential.
When a good Minsithar player ults you, be prepared to die, cus you won't be able to escape without your dashes.

dominants.dominant_desc: Once your team is already at an advantage, always deny the enemy jungler's buffs and creeps, then make sure to always assert dominance, Leomord is best when he initiates fights as long as there is a chance. But be careful not to underestimate the enemy as it might come back at you

emblems.emblem_desc:
Leomord has a slow attack speed in the early game, that's why you'll need the talent swift. 

Seasoned hunter is best for jungle creeps as it deals more damage. 

Then, Killing spree for prolonged fights, this helps Leomord sustain more as it returns health after hitting low hp enemies

equips.equip_desc: This build is the best in any team composition. It has high damage, high sustain, and survivability.
This build can also be used in any team composition but you'll need to be able to know a lot of macro and micro techniques for it to work.

hero.hero_overview: Leomord is one of the best jungler in the current meta, he can he easily dominate the early game with his poke, mobilty, and stong teamfight initiation.
hero.hero_strength: Leomord can easily win the jungle, once he got the early advantage from the enemies, he is very likely to secure objectives with his 1st skill retribution combo. He also has a very high chase ability, catching the back lines with a proper set up of his ultimate skill.
hero.hero_weakness: Although Leomord is a very versatile pick, he is weak against heroes with hard crowd control, like tigreal, akai, franco, and etc.. But do not falter, if you position well, with Leomord's kit you can easily overturn the fight to your advantage.

data.recommend: I do recommend everyone to practice more and know your heroes strengths and weaknesses in order to dominate the game easier.

spell.spell_desc: Since jungling is best for Leomord, it's certain that you'll use retribution.

data.title: Jungle Leomord Tips

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Atlas skill set compliments Leomord skill set because he able groups up enemies allowing Leomored to deal massive Aoe (Area of effect) dmg with his skills  and he provides multiple stuns and slows
Tigreal skill set compliments Leomord skill set because he able groups up enemies allowing Leomored to deal massive Aoe (Area of effect) dmg with his skills
Angela skill set helps provide Leomord with extra movement speed and shields and better hp regen which helps Leomord sustain better during fights
Minotuar skills help Leomord sustain longer during fights with the healing from his second skill and u can enage to force out enemy skills for Leomord to finish them off

counters.counter_desc: She has too much cc which can disrupt your skills and engages and she deals alot of poke dmg
he has too much cc which can disrupt your skills and engages and he deals alot of poke dmg and has alot of slows
His ult stops he from using your second dashes and he has massive dmg and sustain to boot and he cancels your whole engage with one ult

dominants.dominant_desc:
Leomord is dominate from the early to mid game because once he is able to reach lv4 able to do so much things around the map 

I do recommend u to play safe before your lv 4 because leomord can be weak in the early stages  of the game without his ult 

Before u commit to a fight wait for your front-liner to initiate  the fight in order to bait out enemy skills or CC possibly even battle spells like Flicker or Purify 

U can your ult as a layer of CC by using the knock back Barbiel has when u summon him

Prioritize killing back-line hero like mages,marksmen and surpports during this stage of the games to get ur snowballl

tower dive if u have enough hp during your mounted state because u are able to do so and survive during this stage of the game 

Use first skill most the time before u ult (note it depends on the distance between u and the enemy , if they are close use and if not don't use it )

Use your ult to clears waves ,because it allows u clear waves faster

emblems.emblem_desc: this emblem set up is great on Leomord ,because it provides th e right amount of sustain well still providing the necessary amount of damage

equips.equip_desc:
This build is your hybrid build the u use in most of your matches ,because it is provides things like cooldown reduction(CDR),sustain and the right amount of dmg

But i do recommend u adjust your build according to your enemies , in that sense i mean building anti-heal items when needed like Sea- Helbard

This is build u use when the enemies are mostly squishes and cannot sustain your damage , this build well mostly guarantee u to dominate matches in the right situations and can be used if u are the team finisher

hero.hero_overview: My thoughts on leomord is that is he an exceptional hero when he is used to his fullest protentional and when given the rigth conditions ,he is absoluting rewarding
hero.hero_strength:
Leomord strengths are as follows 
1. He can chase down fleeing enemies because of dashes from his unmounted and mounted states
2.He has a crazy amount of sustain in teamfights or when ganking
3. He clears the jungle absoluting fast resulting in him being gank lanes faster and route around the map faster
4.He is flexiable enough to be as a team finisher or a front liner
hero.hero_weakness:
he is extremly weak to (Crowd control better known as CC) ,Because it can disrupt his engages or his skill timing  

he is also weak to pokes that chip at his hp over time can cuase him to be unable to commit to a fight when he is needed

great examples of his weakness or counters are heros like Zhuxin,Valir and etc heros who offer both massive cc and a ton of poke dmg

data.recommend: I recommend u to build a deep connection with Leomored first as hero before u play

spell.spell_desc: Retribution is a great spell on Leomord ,because it helps him farm the jungle faster and is great when he is contesting for objectives such as lord or turtle and it helps snowball a slight advantage to a massive lead

emblems.emblem_desc: I chose this emblem set because Killing Spree allows Leomord to sustain longer in team fights by recovering HP after each kill. The bonus movement speed also helps him chase down enemies or escape after engaging, maximizing his effectiveness as a fighter/assassin.

equips.equip_desc: This build is designed for a hybrid fighter/assassin who needs mobility, burst damage, and survivability. Ice Hunter's Swift Boots enhance jungle capability and movement. Sky Piercer and Sea Halberd provide strong damage with anti-heal. Rose Gold Meteor and Queen's Wings help sustain in fights, while War Axe scales well in extended battles. Ideal for heroes who dive into fights and need to stay alive while dealing damage.

hero.hero_overview: Leomord is a powerful fighter known for his deadly chase and burst damage. His ultimate skill summons Barbiel, his loyal steed, transforming him into a mobile menace who can dive into backlines and eliminate squishy targets with ease. Primarily played in the EXP lane, Leomord excels in split-pushing and mid-to-late game skirmishes, especially when he has farmed his core items. His skill set allows him to sustain in lane and initiate fights effectively.
hero.hero_strength:
High burst damage, especially when mounted.

Excellent mobility with Barbiel, perfect for chasing down escaping enemies.

Can turn the tide of team fights with a well-timed ultimate.

Strong dueling potential, especially in the mid and late game.

Good sustain from his passive and spell vamp builds.
hero.hero_weakness:
Relies heavily on his ultimate for full potential; without Barbiel, he's less threatening.

Vulnerable to crowd control and burst damage before transforming.

Needs farm and items to be effective, weak early game.

Can struggle against mobile mages and marksmen who can kite him.

spell.spell_desc: Choose retribution for jungling but if u don't want jungle u can use inspire for more attack speed & crit chance or vengeance for sustaining leomord.

hero.hero_overview: Leomord is the best Assassin if you know to use him properly in the Rank. In my point of view he can be master easily if you know his skill, timing of ultimate as well as playing in jungle you need to retribution the turtle, lord ,creeps as well as enemy hero. To know the proper guide of this hero he doesn't need stack up but brust damage matters a lot as well as team fight he is very reliable with many combos with heroes like Angela, Johnson ,etc.
hero.hero_strength: He is good against Lancelot, Estes, Gusion ,Nolan, etc. as well as he is good against many heroes whose against magic damage as well as tanky heroes he can sustain in any role in exp lane as we as jungle role but,  it is best in jungle role. He is good in Solo qué, Trio and Whole Squard. He is good in team fight. He is good in early game and Mid game but, it is difficult in late game to adjust but, with good teammates it is reliable to use in better composition to achieve Victory.
hero.hero_weakness: He is not good against heroes like Julian, Alpha , Hilda , etc. are the counter picks of him where he is good if you know his all combo it is bad to counter meta heroes in late game like Layla, Kiya, Cecilion ,etc. In Solo gank it is not suitable to use combo if you are alone in late game the enemy can gank you in any situations so, be with team in late game. You have to wait your ultimate to gank if you fight without it is total loss as well as if you miss the horse then you have to wait for his next ultimate to gank with enemies.

dominants.dominant_desc: clear ur waves as fast as possible, hug ur tower and don't ever hold ur lane. If you find ur enemy holding ur lane, just rotate to midlane and show urself, that way they'll be force to clear the wave to get u back on the same lane.

Make sure that you're ultimate is up. Use the combo Ult, 1st, 2nd, 1st, 2nd or whatever as long as u use all of ur "human" skills and then the "horse" skills. This way u can burst or atleast injure their jungler or their whole team.

whenever you're riding barbiel(Ultimate/horse), you gain damage, new set of skills, movement speed, as well as PHY and MAGIC DEFENSE. Take note of that. always be at ur ultimate in team fights. His Armor in the late game will be atleast 100+ or 150+. Don't be afraid to fight enemies in clash, or even tank the damage.

emblems.emblem_desc: Lifesteal and movement speed, as long as the enemies hp is half you will deal crits. So after getting the kill movement speed and regen is very helpful.

equips.equip_desc: always use tough boots. it helps you to get out of situations more quickly. Sky piercer will help your killing capabilities and it matches well with ur passive. The next few items are basically damage, cd reductions, and spellvamp

hero.hero_overview: Most people use leomord in the jungle because he's not that strong in the exp lane. But, i think right now he currently holds an average spot.
hero.hero_strength: He's strong in team fights and initiation, so be sure to always have ur ult when taking turtles and lords.
hero.hero_weakness: He's ultimate dependent, so you can get bursted easily if u don't have ur horse.

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
ANGELA is the PERFECT pair for Leomord, her skills greatly enhances Leomord's survivability, mobility and damage output. 

Angela's healing and utility perfectly complements Leomord's playstyle which allows him to fully unleash and chase enemies in the battlefield!

counters.counter_desc:
KHUFRA is the NUMBER 1 counter for Leomord. 

Khufra's skills are tailored to disrupt his skills, limiting his combo and movement.

When faced with a Minsitthar in the other team, you MUST let him use his ULTIMATE skill before attacking. 

Minsitthar's Ultimate greatly counters Leomord's skills and makes him super vulnerable.

dominants.dominant_desc:
~ Start by clearing the red or purple buff depending on the laning of your exp. 

~ Avoid Risky invades.

~ Make sure to clear your jungle side first before ganking.

Once you've reached level 4, immediately look for a kill.

Check for a gank opportunity on which lane has an opponent that overextended (Usually the EXP lane where Turtle is).

Consider a quick gank and secure the Turtle with ur exp laner.

~ Make sure you have all of your skills before attacking in team fights. Utilizing all of Leomord's skills is a MUST.

~ Wait for the enemy to use their CC skills before attacking. This ensures a smooth combo.

~ Attack the squishy heroes first ( usually the Marksman or Mage. )

emblems.emblem_desc:
As an aggressive Leomord user, this is the perfect emblem set for me. 

Rupture: Helps burst tanky enemies with my combo.

Wilderness Blessing: Leomord farms in the jungle pretty quickly when used right, and this emblem talent helps me move throughout the jungle.

Killing Spree: With every kill you get some HP and gain movement speed which helps alot with chasing ur enemies.

equips.equip_desc:
I personally think that this is the best build for Leomord. 

It optimizes Leomord's damage and effectiveness in teamfights.

The build that took me to top 1.

~ Hunter strike is the key item for Leomord. CD + Speed Boost.

~ Malefic Roar will help you deal with tanky opponents. 

~ Blade of despair will increase Leomord's burst potential for finishing low-HP enemies.

~ Sea halberd is a must item when enemies have healing abilities.

~ Immortality helps with sustainability in late game.

hero.hero_strength:
Leomord  has high burst damage when mounted on his Phantom Steed.

His passive deals great critical damage when the enemy HP is low.
hero.hero_weakness:
Leomord is susceptible to CC ~ Crowd Control. 

Tips: 

~ Let the enemy use their CC ability first before attacking with your combo

spell.spell_desc:
As a Leomord User, I recommend being the Jungler and using the ICE Retribution spell. 

Tips:

~ To succesfully secure the Turtle or Lord, use his first skill, and quickly tap the Retribution spell.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Angela will provide Leomord additional shield and constant healing which will help him to fight even if there is a disadvantage in item builds or level.

Due to her ult everyone is affected by CC and constant damage revolves around them and this is when Leomord can strike with his ult securing everyone becomes low hp therefore his passive unlocks and he can obliterate them

counters.counter_desc: Khufra is a massive counter for leomord only because of his second skill where he turns into a ball not letting anyone dash infront of him and Leomord contains dashes in his ult or his basic skills therefore its a real threat for him to do better infront of Khufra.

dominants.dominant_desc: Make sure to take advantage of his passive in the early and and make sure to go for fights only using his ultimate and if fights are not on your side then go for farming only which will allow him to get the items needed to be strong and through the mid game try to go for objectives or kill the Oppositions marksman or mage in order to gain sky piercer passive then through the late game make sure to team fight only not focusing solo laning

emblems.emblem_desc:
Fatal will allow him to gain critical hit chances which will be very effective during early game.
Festival Of Blood will acquire him spell vamp as his build will be more likely full of damage items and attack speed items.
Killing Spree is the major emblem here as it will give him instant recovery of HP when he kills any enemy that will give him the advantage to continue fights as a result it will be easier for him to go for savage or maniac.

equips.equip_desc: The key is to increase potential physical damage in the early game and increase in attack speed in order to increase his speed so that he gets to his passive where he can critical damage as soon as enemies get to half of their health.

hero.hero_overview: Leomord is a type of hero which can initiate a fight or rather be a finisher who will come at the end of a fight to jeopardize the enemies.He is a very good hero to deal damage at the beginning and through the ending but is very weakened if he is struck by CC effects.
hero.hero_strength: High damage since the beginning and since at the start of the match all heroes are squishy he can easily melt them with his ultimate and before mounting barbiel he can use his first skill to burst out enemies physical defence.
hero.hero_weakness: Crown Control is one of the major disadvantages of Leomord as due to CC he cannot initiate a fight or go into the brawl as it will restrict him to persuade any fight.
